Bright Trinket Amulet

Once in a while, when taking damage, the unit throws a grenade at the unit that has dealt damage. The grenade deals 100000 physical damage and stuns the target and all enemies in a small radius around the target for 2 sec. When the stun ends, it blinds all affected enemies for 3 sec. The blinded units have 60% chance to miss their target.

Requirements: 98-100
